content:
Complete the abstract class `SupplyChainPartner` and create two subclasses `Manufacturer` and `Supplier` by following the given instructions.

**Abstract _SupplyChainPartner_ class**:

The `SupplyChainPartner` class is an abstract class that defines a template for supply chain partners, which includes manufacturers and suppliers. It has attributes for identification and methods for supply chain operations.

<details>

<summary>**Features to be added to _SupplyChainPartner_ class**</summary>

- **Attributes**:
 - The `SupplyChainPartner` class should have the following attributes:
  - `id` (int): Unique identifier for the supply chain partner.
  - `name` (str): Name of the supply chain partner.
  - `contact` (str): Contact information of the supply chain partner.
- **Abstract Methods**:
 - Define an abstract method `supply()` that has no implementation.
 - Define an abstract method `receive_order()` that has no implementation.

</details>

<details>
<summary>**Features to be added to _Manufacturer_ and _Supplier_ subclasses**</summary>

- **Manufacturer**:
 - Implement the `supply()` method to print "Manufacturer `name` is supplying products."
 - Implement the `receive_order()` method to print "Manufacturer `name` received an order."

- **Supplier**:
 - Implement the `supply()` method to print "Supplier `name` is delivering products."
 - Implement the `receive_order()` method to print "Supplier `name` received an order."

</details>

<MultiLineNote>

- Do not edit the `default_test` function as this will affect the test cases.
- The output of the testcase **Checking Default Tests** is given by the `default_test` function in the prefilled code. Do not **edit or delete** the `default_test` function.
- This Coding question does not have the usual input/output testcases. The classes defined by you will be tested internally whether the attributes and methods are present or not. So in testcases results, you will be shown the rough description of the tests that will be verified.

</MultiLineNote>

test_cases.input: Checking if correct attribute names are used
test_cases.output: PASS: All attributes are present and correctly initialized.

test_cases.input: Checking if methods are implemented correctly
test_cases.output: PASS: All methods are implemented correctly.

Manufacturer Acme Corp is supplying products.
Manufacturer Acme Corp received an order.
Supplier Supply Solutions is delivering products.
Supplier Supply Solutions received an order.
